programme.title: Ranch to Table
programme.desc: As Elizabeth's family is originally from Spain, she has a long felt connection to Spanish culture and food; one of her best friends is visiting the ranch, and to celebrate, Elizabeth cooks a Spanish-inspired dinner with paella and churros.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Reimagined
programme.desc: A couple wants to update an old brick brewery into a forever home for their family; with Vern's help, they take a local landmark from cold and industrial to warm and stylish with an eclectic design.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Living the Lake Life Dream on Lake Amon G. Carter, Texas
programme.desc: After years of visits to the lake, the family of five is ready to find a forever home on Lake Amon G. Carter; their dream is to build a home with unlimited activities for all and unmatched views of the lake from every angle.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ranch to Table
programme.desc: While Austin is away at a bull sale, Elizabeth and the boys enjoy a slow morning; on days like these, Elizabeth loves making a special breakfast for them; she's making some of their favorites: ableskivers and a rustic baked egg dish with salsa.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ranch to Table
programme.desc: As Elizabeth's family is originally from Spain, she has a long felt connection to Spanish culture and food; one of her best friends is visiting the ranch, and to celebrate, Elizabeth cooks a Spanish-inspired dinner with paella and churros.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: For the Love of Kitchens
programme.desc: Paul and Helen create a working kitchen for a chef's home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: For the Love of Kitchens
programme.desc: Paul and Helen create a kitchen for a family with a minimalist lifestyle.

programme.title: For the Love of Kitchens
programme.sub-title: A Kitchen Fit for a Castle
programme.desc: Paul and Helen design a kitchen in a home on castle grounds.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Reimagined
programme.desc: A couple wants to update an old brick brewery into a forever home for their family; with Vern's help, they take a local landmark from cold and industrial to warm and stylish with an eclectic design.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Looking for harmony with Krystal and Josh, two music producers in search of a peaceful place to compose and raise their child; checking out an island retreat, a sleek, terraced beachside property and a timber-ceiling home with a unique wine feature.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Taking stock with recent retirees Irv and Sheryl, who want a well-appointed, grandkid-friendly hideaway; exploring a magnificent home with a gourmet kitchen, a peninsula property with killer views, and a modern custom build on multiple tiers of land.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: June and Patrick, along with their large and active blended family, are on the lookout for their dream lake house.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Dennis and Melanie hunt for a lake house that can serve as both their home and workspace; Melanie is looking for a space that can accommodate her dance business, while Dennis wants the perfect man cave.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Jordan and Aurelio search for a home that can accommodate their growing family in the future; they have a few big-ticket items on their wish list, including a gourmet kitchen, home office, dedicated children's room and a gym.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Looking for harmony with Krystal and Josh, two music producers in search of a peaceful place to compose and raise their child; checking out an island retreat, a sleek, terraced beachside property and a timber-ceiling home with a unique wine feature.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Taking stock with recent retirees Irv and Sheryl, who want a well-appointed, grandkid-friendly hideaway; exploring a magnificent home with a gourmet kitchen, a peninsula property with killer views, and a modern custom build on multiple tiers of land.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: June and Patrick, along with their large and active blended family, are on the lookout for their dream lake house.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Dennis and Melanie hunt for a lake house that can serve as both their home and workspace; Melanie is looking for a space that can accommodate her dance business, while Dennis wants the perfect man cave.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Jordan and Aurelio search for a home that can accommodate their growing family in the future; they have a few big-ticket items on their wish list, including a gourmet kitchen, home office, dedicated children's room and a gym.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Looking for harmony with Krystal and Josh, two music producers in search of a peaceful place to compose and raise their child; checking out an island retreat, a sleek, terraced beachside property and a timber-ceiling home with a unique wine feature.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Taking stock with recent retirees Irv and Sheryl, who want a well-appointed, grandkid-friendly hideaway; exploring a magnificent home with a gourmet kitchen, a peninsula property with killer views, and a modern custom build on multiple tiers of land.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: June and Patrick, along with their large and active blended family, are on the lookout for their dream lake house.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Dennis and Melanie hunt for a lake house that can serve as both their home and workspace; Melanie is looking for a space that can accommodate her dance business, while Dennis wants the perfect man cave.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The crew takes the week off to work in their own backyards; in West Virginia, Kentucky, Pennsylvania and Virginia, the guys build furniture, cut trees, and plant gardens; Mark Bowe visits the finished Catskill cabin in Shawangunk, N.Y.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: While half the crew builds a secluded hunting cabin in Guyton, Georgia, the other half strips a pre-Civil War cabin in West Virginia; Mark Bowe visits an extraordinary round barn up in Pennsylvania that's unlike anything he's ever seen.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Mark finds a Pennsylvania barn that's being torn down and buys it then and there; Johnny deals with overhead wires, Sherman works with one good arm, and Tim never stops running.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: In Ballard, West Virginia, the Barnwood Builders discover a pre-Civil War cabin; Mark teaches his son some valuable log cabin lessons.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: In New Freeport, Pa., the Barnwood Builders save a cabin with incredible stonework and the guys learn pioneer stone techniques from a local expert; Mark visits two incredible restorations; Alex makes a special wedding gift out of antique wood.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Mark challenges the two youngest members of the team to take down a few logs; Johnny gets a special visit from his dad; Graham reveals some secrets about the pioneers; the guys take a tour of an old grist mill; Johnny Jett's favorite covered bridge.

programme.title: Motel Rescue
programme.desc: In the Florida Keys, major competition and an impending change in ownership mean the pressure is on for Lindsey; she needs creative solutions for a host of problems to make sure the family-owned motel thrives for a long time to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.sub-title: Little House on the Production Line
programme.desc: The crew takes on a modular build to help a dad who's been raising his three daughters in his parents' in-law suite. Meanwhile, Ashley has the crew crawling up the walls to complete a special project for the little girls.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters head to Winthrop, Maine to rescue a couple from their DIY project; with a new addition, deck, storage, and a mouse issue to fix, can the crew finish in time for the owners' 10th anniversary?

programme.title: Motel Rescue
programme.desc: In the Florida Keys, major competition and an impending change in ownership mean the pressure is on for Lindsey; she needs creative solutions for a host of problems to make sure the family-owned motel thrives for a long time to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.sub-title: Little House on the Production Line
programme.desc: The crew takes on a modular build to help a dad who's been raising his three daughters in his parents' in-law suite. Meanwhile, Ashley has the crew crawling up the walls to complete a special project for the little girls.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters head to Winthrop, Maine to rescue a couple from their DIY project; with a new addition, deck, storage, and a mouse issue to fix, can the crew finish in time for the owners' 10th anniversary?

programme.title: Motel Rescue
programme.desc: In the Florida Keys, major competition and an impending change in ownership mean the pressure is on for Lindsey; she needs creative solutions for a host of problems to make sure the family-owned motel thrives for a long time to come.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The crew takes the week off to work in their own backyards; in West Virginia, Kentucky, Pennsylvania and Virginia, the guys build furniture, cut trees, and plant gardens; Mark Bowe visits the finished Catskill cabin in Shawangunk, N.Y.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: While half the crew builds a secluded hunting cabin in Guyton, Georgia, the other half strips a pre-Civil War cabin in West Virginia; Mark Bowe visits an extraordinary round barn up in Pennsylvania that's unlike anything he's ever seen.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Mark finds a Pennsylvania barn that's being torn down and buys it then and there; Johnny deals with overhead wires, Sherman works with one good arm, and Tim never stops running.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters head to Winthrop, Maine to rescue a couple from their DIY project; with a new addition, deck, storage, and a mouse issue to fix, can the crew finish in time for the owners' 10th anniversary?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Jordan and Aurelio search for a home that can accommodate their growing family in the future; they have a few big-ticket items on their wish list, including a gourmet kitchen, home office, dedicated children's room and a gym.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Chantal and Keith's dream is to own a lakefront house, but their picky nature has stopped them from settling for anything less than perfect; overall, they have seen 300 properties but have yet to find the one.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Glen and Sherry have recently become empty nesters and are looking forward to this new stage of life; they are looking to make a permanent move to a lakefront property with space for guests and possible income potential.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Deb and Wolfe were friends many years ago, and after reuniting 40 years later, they fall in love and get married; the couple is looking for a lakefront home where they can enjoy time with their blended family and have space for Deb's fashion career.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Joey and Tatiana are boat captains looking for the perfect lakefront property to entertain friends; the first property is situated on an island with a modern and open-concept design; the next is situated on a peninsula with views of the lake.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Chantal and Keith's dream is to own a lakefront house, but their picky nature has stopped them from settling for anything less than perfect; overall, they have seen 300 properties but have yet to find the one.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Glen and Sherry have recently become empty nesters and are looking forward to this new stage of life; they are looking to make a permanent move to a lakefront property with space for guests and possible income potential.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Deb and Wolfe were friends many years ago, and after reuniting 40 years later, they fall in love and get married; the couple is looking for a lakefront home where they can enjoy time with their blended family and have space for Deb's fashion career.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Joey and Tatiana are boat captains looking for the perfect lakefront property to entertain friends; the first property is situated on an island with a modern and open-concept design; the next is situated on a peninsula with views of the lake.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Chantal and Keith's dream is to own a lakefront house, but their picky nature has stopped them from settling for anything less than perfect; overall, they have seen 300 properties but have yet to find the one.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Glen and Sherry have recently become empty nesters and are looking forward to this new stage of life; they are looking to make a permanent move to a lakefront property with space for guests and possible income potential.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Deb and Wolfe were friends many years ago, and after reuniting 40 years later, they fall in love and get married; the couple is looking for a lakefront home where they can enjoy time with their blended family and have space for Deb's fashion career.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Joey and Tatiana are boat captains looking for the perfect lakefront property to entertain friends; the first property is situated on an island with a modern and open-concept design; the next is situated on a peninsula with views of the lake.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions
programme.sub-title: A Closet Fit for a Queen
programme.desc: In the second phase of Tamara's 1905 Colonial renovation, she creates a 900-square-foot master suite and converts one of the home's seven sun porches into a closet; her budget takes a hit when she needs to install a new HVAC unit.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Bathrooms, Kitchen and Balconies on North Hutchinson Island
programme.desc: An engaged couple from Jacksonville are ready to start a new chapter together on the shores of North Hutchinson Island, Florida.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Renovating a York, Maine Family Getaway
programme.desc: A native New Englander who grew up vacationing on the shores of York, Maine, is hoping to achieve his dream of owning a home in town; property in York isn't cheap, but having a place to build memories could be worth dealing with a major renovation.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Cute Cottage on the Gulf Shore
programme.desc: A newly married woman gets to use her interior design skills to renovate her own beach house, creating a cozy getaway and a source of extra rental income for her family.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Ambitious Beach Dreams in Corolla, North Carolina
programme.desc: A couple who met along the shores of Corolla, N.C., searches for a home in town they can renovate into their dream vacation getaway, but finding an affordable beach property they can transform on schedule and budget could be a challenge.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: An Investor Renovates a Myrtle Beach Vacation Rental
programme.desc: A real estate investor is looking to renovate an outdated property steps from the beach, and pack it with amenities to turn it into a prime Myrtle Beach, S.C., vacation destination that stands out from all the other rentals.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A Washington couple and their four kids take on the majority of their beach house renovations themselves, but the help doesn't stop there, as extended family and good friends drop in to help them turn a bargain buy into their dream vacation getaway.

programme.title: Design Down Under
programme.desc: A couple calls on Georgia and Richie to transform their cramped bungalow without stripping away its charm; Georgia and Richie maximize the floor plan to create the Italian farmhouse-inspired space the couple has always dreamed of.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Condo Reno for Family Beach Trips in Belleair Bluffs, Florida
programme.desc: A retired couple seeks a beachfront condo to rent out and to host their big family with lots of grandchildren. They entrust a contractor to make extensive cosmetic updates to an outdated unit to turn it into their dream beach getaway.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: California Couple Seeks Cozy Retreat on Puget Sound
programme.desc: A couple from Long Beach dreams of a retreat on Washington state's Puget Sound, where rocky shores, pine trees and hiking replace California beaches. With young kids growing up fast, they hope to reconnect with family and nature by restoring a hidden gem.

programme.title: Design Down Under
programme.desc: A couple calls on Georgia and Richie to transform their cramped bungalow without stripping away its charm; Georgia and Richie maximize the floor plan to create the Italian farmhouse-inspired space the couple has always dreamed of.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Condo Reno for Family Beach Trips in Belleair Bluffs, Florida
programme.desc: A retired couple seeks a beachfront condo to rent out and to host their big family with lots of grandchildren. They entrust a contractor to make extensive cosmetic updates to an outdated unit to turn it into their dream beach getaway.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: California Couple Seeks Cozy Retreat on Puget Sound
programme.desc: A couple from Long Beach dreams of a retreat on Washington state's Puget Sound, where rocky shores, pine trees and hiking replace California beaches. With young kids growing up fast, they hope to reconnect with family and nature by restoring a hidden gem.
